title: Cold Call Script & Follow-Up Email
content:
Cold Call Script & Follow-Up Email

for Ulti Tool Media Services


Cold Call


---

Introduction


- Caller: Good [morning/afternoon], may I speak with [Client's Name] please? This is [Your Name] from Ulti Tool Media. How are you today?

Building Rapport and Initial Pitch


- Caller: I'm glad to hear that! I’m reaching out briefly to share some exciting ways we are helping businesses like yours expand their digital footprint and enhance online engagement through tailored marketing strategies. Do you have a moment to explore how this could be relevant for you?

Assessing Client Needs


- Caller: Fantastic, thank you. At Ulti Tool Media, we combine expert human insights with sophisticated AI analytics to deliver impactful digital marketing solutions. Given your role at [Client's Company], I’d love to understand what marketing challenges you are currently facing?

Presenting Services and Value Proposition
context: From document: Cold Call Script & Follow-Up Email — chunk 1 (chunk 1/6)
